line_items.description: Engineering Tasks (NRE): Laser configuration updates, AirOps fields, Dual GPS for heading, 10Hz met data, firmware customization, extended endurance, manufacturability improvements, data buffering and re-transmission
Materials for engineering tasks: Dual GPS unit ($1,000), extended endurance battery tweaks ($200), manufacturability improvements ($500)
Clear Air Testing 2025 ($4,852) and Hurricane Flights 2025 ($16,000)
